headline: What T. Rowe Price Group (TROW)'s New CLO Platform Means For Shareholders
summary: Earlier in April 2026, T. Rowe Price entered the CLO issuer market with ROWE CLO 2026-1 Ltd., a US$403.59 million deal backed mainly by broadly syndicated first-lien loans and managed through T. Rowe Price Associates. This move extends the firm’s fixed income and leveraged credit platform, giving clients another way to access higher-income, actively managed bank loan exposure within a securitized structure. We’ll now examine how T. Rowe Price’s move into issuing CLOs could influence its...
